label: held-out-openings-v1
note: Frozen held-out benchmark: twelve mid-opening positions reached through different games than the reference training set (verified disjoint by FEN). ex-12 repeats ex-01's position on purpose: the same position sampled twice is a real multiplicity and must hash differently from sampling it once.
